vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

verify.value: All required fields are present and non-empty.
verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields in the schema are included and filled.
The estimated mass should align with the overall vehicle's mass budget.

verify.value: All required features are represented in the geometry operations.
verify.rule: Each required feature in the part_tree must be explicitly defined in the geometry_ops.

verify.value: Interfaces with left/right wings and front GPS boom are reciprocal.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must be reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints require visible evidence of locking or preload.

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress on avionics bay due to solar radiation.
risk.mit: Implement additional thermal insulation or active cooling system.

risk.desc: Risk of belly camera window seal failure during flight.
risk.mit: Use high-quality sealing materials and conduct rigorous testing.

risk.desc: Increased complexity in manufacturing due to multiple internal features.
risk.mit: Optimize manufacturing strategy to streamline production.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment issues during assembly of adjacent interfaces.
risk.mit: Enhance alignment aids and conduct thorough pre-assembly checks.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness leading to structural failures.
risk.mit: Conduct finite element analysis and reinforce critical areas.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.path: Nacelle loads -> Wing spar socket -> Fuselage spine
Avionics cooling airflow -> Avionics bay -> Rear exhaust vents
Solar radiation -> Outer shell -> Inner insulation -> Avionics bay
Wing spar -> Spar socket -> Fuselage spine
Belly camera window -> Camera sensor -> Internal electronics bay
Avionics bay -> Electrical harnesses -> Nacelle control systems
Service hatch -> Avionics bay -> Maintenance access

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Add additional stiffeners for increased structural integrity
Incorporate modular avionics bay for easy upgrades
Optimize cooling channel for better heat dissipation

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: ±0.5mm for critical interfaces, ±1mm for general surfaces
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures oriented for minimal interference with final product
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, CMM for dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.focus: Sealing effectiveness of belly camera window
Ease of maintenance through service hatch
Alignment and fit of adjacent interfaces

generated_parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

requirements: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin
Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable
Structural integrity for nacelle loads into fuselage spine
V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure
Critical slip, snap, pin, hinge, and slide interfaces state plausible clearances
Each subsystem has at least three adjacent interfaces or datums
Holes, slots, and pockets match real catalog hardware sizes
Tilt axis, bearing seats, servo/linkage access, and nacelle rotation clearance are visible
Wing spar socket, fuselage spine, and payload/battery service paths are separate and inspectable
Output remains educational mockup, avoiding operational flight tuning or control-law details
Tilt mechanism loads route through bearing seats into wing structure via named fittings, and motor/servo modules remain replaceable through access covers

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value, and verify must include a mass/budget check.

verify.value: All required features are present.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: All parts and geometry operations are traceable.
verify.rule: Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal and named.
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible locking/preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment due to bolted connections between the wing and fuselage spine.
risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools during assembly and ensure all bolts are torqued to specification.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around the nacelle harness pass could lead to interference during assembly.
risk.mit: Increase the clearance around the harness pass to ensure smooth assembly.

risk.desc: The landing gear mount may experience excessive wear if not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure the landing gear mount is correctly positioned and secured to prevent wear.

risk.desc: The sensor pocket might interfere with other components if not accurately placed.
risk.mit: Review the placement of the sensor pocket to avoid any potential interferences.

risk.desc: Improper fastening of the wing spar could result in structural failure.
risk.mit: Implement a robust fastening procedure and conduct regular inspections.
